dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7229 IH: Territorial SBA Loan Guaranty Adjustment Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Moylan (for himself and Ms. King-Hinds) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Small Business

form.official-title: To amend the Small Business Act to provide for loan guarantees to certain small businesses, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Territorial SBA Loan Guaranty Adjustment Act of 2026.

section.header: Loan guarantees for covered territory businesses

subsection.text: Section 7(a)(2) of the Small Business Act (15 U.S.C. 636(a)(2)) is amended by adding at the end the following:

subparagraph.header: Participation in loan to covered territory business

clause.text: Except as provided in clause (ii), in an agreement to participate in a loan to a covered territory business on a deferred basis under this subsection, the participation by the Administration shall be 90 percent.
Clause (i) shall not apply with respect to a loan under paragraph (9), (14)(A), (16), (31), or (34), or under a pilot program carried out pursuant to paragraph (25).

subsection.text: Section 7(a)(2)(A) of such Act is amended by striking and (F) and inserting (F), and (G).
